title: senecio eruciformis var. eruciformis
intro: Senecio eruciformis var. eruciformis, also known as Tassy Everlasting, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern region of Western Australia. This plant is a member of the daisy family and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Tassy Everlasting include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Tassy Everlasting can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
